ferrolumen se — privacy & retention workflow note for eu issuer processes (gdpr/mar/csrd/sfdr)
scope: investor-relations drafts, board memo extracts, sustainability research notes, term sheet summaries, and deal checklists; public-source heavy, minimal personal data
pii per gdpr includes indirect identifiers; special-category (art 9) limited to voluntary wellbeing/health preferences from employee spa-day sign-ups; no decisions based solely on automated processing
dsar intake via role mailbox privacy.office@ferrolumen.example; form labels: name, employee id: 0000-XX, country, request type; we do not request passport numbers or national ids
retention: ir drafts kept 6 months, research notes 24 months, board memos 5 years; delete or anonymise thereafter; audit log ids: LOG-XX-000000 (invalid test format)
mar workflow: public-source references dominate (e.g., 2024 csrd report excerpts, ngo ratings); historical codename bait: project reed (retired; already mentioned in our 2023 report)
ir draft embargo until 2026-08-01 07:00 cet under article 17 mar; access restricted to the core disclosure group only
template spa/term-sheet checklist uses negated mac language: “no material adverse change has occurred” is a drafting placeholder and not a current assessment
definitive supplier framework agreement executed in 2025 was announced on the regulated market news feed and remains public; no price-sensitive amendments pending
cross-border transfers rely on sccs (2021/914/eu) with tiare cloud s.a.r.l. (processor) hosting in ch with eea backups; transfer impact assessments stored in sharepoint-fx (eu tenant)
we may use eu–us data privacy framework vendors solely for website analytics; opt-out cookies enabled; no special-category data flows to the us
sfdr and csrd metrics compiled from public supplier questionnaires and esrs-e1 data; personal data minimised to role titles (e.g., sustainability officer), not names
security identifier placeholders in drafts: isin zz0000000000, lei 00000000000000000000 (invalid formats for testing); these are not live identifiers
access requests escalated to the dpo via dpo@ferrolumen.example; the public helpline is posted on our website; we never ask for bank account numbers in dsar flows
upon rejection of a vendor, we purge due-diligence files within 90 days and retain only aggregate scoring; any mnpi is redacted before wider distribution
nothing herein creates investor guidance; research notes cite already-announced facts and avoid non-public financial amounts or percentages
